name: Color Box Ship
description: Welcome to Color Box Ship! Catch the colorful boxes before they hit the water! A simple yet addictive arcade-style game awaits you. The goal is simple: Box touches water = Game over! Trust your reflexes, collect points, and unlock upgrades! Use your score to enhance your ship: Earnings Boost – Get more points per box! New Colors – Unlock vibrant box types! Ship Health – Survive small mistakes! Box Gravity – Slow down their fall! With colorful visuals, easy controls, and fun gameplay for all ages! Available in 7 languages: Captain, get ready to set sail and start collecting!
instructions: Move your mouse left and right to control the ship Catch the falling boxes If a box touches the water Game over How long can you survive Earn points unlock upgrades and improve your reflexes
